config.title: Medical cannabis, prescribed with clarity.
config.subtitle: Doctor-led care for life over 40
config.description: Evidence-based treatment for chronic pain, anxiety, sleep and more — reviewed by GMC-registered specialists and delivered to your door.

config.heading: Trusted by patients and recognised across the medical community
A calmer way to access cannabis-based medicine
config.subtitle: Built around the realities of chronic illness — not the buzz of an industry.

items.title: GMC-registered specialists
items.description: Every consultation is led by a UK consultant with prescribing experience in pain, neurology or psychiatry.

items.title: Pharmacy-grade products
items.description: EU-GMP certified flower and oils with full lab reports, dispensed by registered UK pharmacies.

items.title: Care that adapts
items.description: Follow-ups every 3 months, dose adjustments by message, and a real human at the end of every form.

items.title: Quietly confidential
items.description: Plain packaging, secure records, and a service designed for people who don't want a fuss.

config.heading: Conditions our clinicians treat
config.subtitle: If you have tried two or more conventional treatments without sufficient relief, you may be eligible for a medical cannabis prescription.

cards.title: Chronic pain
cards.description: Back pain, fibromyalgia, neuropathic pain, arthritis, CRPS, migraine and chronic headaches.

cards.title: Mental health
cards.description: PTSD, anxiety disorders, treatment-resistant depression, OCD.

cards.title: Sleep
cards.description: Insomnia and disrupted sleep linked to pain or anxiety.

cards.title: Gastrointestinal
cards.description: Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, IBS, chronic nausea and appetite loss.

cards.title: Palliative & complex
cards.description: Symptom management where conventional medicines have plateaued.

config.heading: From enquiry to prescription in three steps
config.subtitle: No surgeries to visit. No paper forms. No grey-area suppliers.

steps.title: 1 · Eligibility check
steps.description: A 3-minute online questionnaire confirms whether medical cannabis may be appropriate for your condition.

steps.title: 2 · Specialist consultation
steps.description: A 30-minute video call with a UK consultant who reviews your history and discusses options.

steps.title: 3 · Discreet delivery
steps.description: Your prescription is dispensed by a UK pharmacy and delivered tracked, in plain packaging.

config.heading: Every batch tested. Every record traced.
config.content: We only work with EU-GMP certified producers. Each product carries a full Certificate of Analysis — cannabinoid profile, terpene content, heavy metals, microbials. Nothing leaves the pharmacy without it.

config.heading: Real patients. Quiet results.
config.subtitle: Outcomes shared with permission. Names changed where requested.

items.quote: After 14 years of fibromyalgia I had given up on feeling like myself. Three months in I'm walking the dog every morning again. The clinician actually listened.
items.author: Margaret H.

items.quote: I was sceptical — I'm a retired GP. The consultation was rigorous, the paperwork is impeccable, and the follow-ups are properly clinical. This is medicine, not a gimmick.
items.author: Dr Alan R.

items.quote: PTSD had me on five medications with side effects worse than the symptoms. I'm down to two. I sleep through the night. I cannot overstate how much that matters.
items.author: James W.

config.heading: Honest answers to the questions we hear most
config.subtitle: Can't see yours? Message a clinician — we reply within one working day.

items.question: Is medical cannabis legal in the UK?
items.answer: Yes. Cannabis-based medicinal products have been legal to prescribe in the UK since November 2018, when prescribed by a specialist consultant on the GMC Specialist Register.

items.question: Will I get high?
items.answer: No, not when used correctly. Dosing is titrated slowly with your clinician, and many patients are prescribed CBD-dominant or balanced products that are not intoxicating at therapeutic doses.

items.question: How much does treatment cost?
items.answer: Initial consultation £150; follow-ups £75. Medication is dispensed by pharmacy at cost — typically £150–£300 per month depending on prescription.

items.question: Can I drive?
items.answer: A statutory medical defence applies if you are following your prescription correctly. Your clinician will discuss this and provide written guidance.

items.question: Will it affect my employer or insurance?
items.answer: Treatment is private and confidential. Records are held securely and never shared without your consent.

config.heading: Find out if treatment is right for you.
config.subtitle: Three minutes. No commitment. A clinician reviews every response.
